issues.label: Issues
issues.description: Search, read, create, and manage Jira issues

boards.label: Boards & Sprints
boards.description: Work with Jira Software boards, sprints, and backlogs

tools.name: search_issues
tools.description: Search for issues using JQL. Returns a compact list of issues with key fields. Uses the modern /search/jql endpoint with nextPageToken pagination.

tools.name: get_issue
tools.description: Get details for a Jira issue by key (e.g. PROJ-123). Converts the issue description from Jira ADF into Markdown for easier reading.

tools.name: get_issue_comments
tools.description: List comments on an issue. Converts each comment body from Jira ADF into Markdown.

tools.name: list_projects
tools.description: List accessible Jira projects (key, name, type). Use this before creating issues to discover valid project keys.

tools.name: get_project
tools.description: Get a project by key or ID. Includes issue types when expandIssueTypes=true, which is useful to choose a valid issue type name before create_issue.

tools.name: get_transitions
tools.description: List available workflow transitions for an issue. Use this to discover valid transition names/IDs before calling transition_issue.

tools.name: get_myself
tools.description: Get the authenticated Jira user profile for the current credentials.

tools.name: search_users
tools.description: Search for users and return accountIds for assignment. Use this to find assigneeAccountId values for create_issue/update_issue/assign_issue.

tools.name: create_issue
tools.description: Create a new Jira issue. Provide descriptionText as plain text; the handler converts it to Jira ADF automatically. Use get_project to discover valid issue types.

tools.name: update_issue
tools.description: Update a Jira issue. You can use simple fields like summary/descriptionText/labels/priorityName/assigneeAccountId, or pass advanced Jira 'fields'/'update' objects for complex updates. descriptionText is converted to ADF automatically.

tools.name: transition_issue
tools.description: Transition an issue to a new workflow status. Provide transitionId or transitionName. If transitionName is provided, the handler resolves it by fetching transitions first. Optionally add a comment during the transition (commentText converted to ADF).

tools.name: add_comment
tools.description: Add a comment to an issue. Provide bodyText as plain text; the handler converts it to Jira ADF automatically.

tools.name: assign_issue
tools.description: Assign an issue to a user (by accountId) or unassign it (accountId=null). Use search_users to find accountIds.

tools.name: delete_issue
tools.description: Delete an issue. This is irreversible. Use with care.

tools.name: list_boards
tools.description: List Jira Software boards. Filter by projectKeyOrId and board type (scrum/kanban).

tools.name: get_board
tools.description: Get details for a Jira Software board by boardId.

tools.name: list_sprints
tools.description: List sprints for a board. Optionally filter by sprint state (future/active/closed).

tools.name: get_sprint
tools.description: Get sprint details by sprintId (name, state, start/end dates, goal).

tools.name: get_sprint_issues
tools.description: List issues in a sprint. Useful for sprint status reports and review preparation.

tools.name: get_backlog_issues
tools.description: List issues in the backlog for a board.

tools.name: move_issues_to_sprint
tools.description: Move one or more issues into a sprint (agile API).
